title: Development tracker watchlist for Gallatin corridor changes
suggestedAngle: Turn permit and planning activity into a plain-English Gallatin watchlist with jokes only after the facts are nailed down.

title: Tomato Art Fest planning and sponsor/event calendar
suggestedAngle: Build a festival prep hub: dates, oddities, vendor watch, parking sanity, family options, and the tomato-adjacent fashion forecast.

title: Neighborhood association updates and civic agenda items
suggestedAngle: Translate neighborhood association updates into what residents actually need to know and what will become a comment-section sport.

title: Private Facebook group temperature check
suggestedAngle: Extract recurring complaints, opening rumors, lost-and-found patterns, and weirdly specific neighborhood debates without treating chatter as fact.

title: Street, sidewalk, and lane closure permit scan
suggestedAngle: Make a weekly Cone Watch that explains exactly where movement will become emotionally expensive.

title: Restaurant and venue account watchlist
suggestedAngle: Track openings, closings, menus, staff hiring, soft launches, and suspiciously confident patio announcements.
